---
title: Week notes (2026-W11)
date: 2026-03-13
date-modified: today
categories:
  - week notes
---

- Worked on qc-reflect and qc-codebook-docs
- Qualitative coding
- Drafted scoping outline for an emails analysis manuscript
- Consolidated a platform for BibVik analysis
- Worked on a system for extracting and analyzing references from PDFs at scale
